# fej

> Fetch API with middleware — TypeScript-first, zero dependencies.

## Install

```
npm install fej
```

## Quick Start

### Layer 1: Drop-in fetch() replacement
```typescript
import { createFej } from 'fej';
const api = createFej({ baseURL: 'https://api.example.com' });

const response = await api.fetch('/users');        // Returns standard Response
const data = await response.json();
```

### Layer 2: Typed convenience methods
```typescript
interface User { id: number; name: string }

const { data } = await api.get<User[]>('/users', { params: { page: 1 } });
const { data: created } = await api.post<User>('/users', { name: 'Alice' });
```

### Layer 3: Middleware
```typescript
api.use('auth', async (ctx, next) => {
  ctx.request.init.headers = new Headers(ctx.request.init.headers);
  ctx.request.init.headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`);
  await next();
});
```

## API Reference

### createFej(config?)

Creates a new Fej instance.

Config options:
- `baseURL?: string` — prepended to all request URLs
- `headers?: HeadersInit` — default headers for all requests
- `timeout?: number` — default timeout in milliseconds
- `throwHttpErrors?: boolean` — throw FejHttpError on 4xx/5xx (default: true, convenience methods only)
- `responseType?: 'json' | 'text' | 'blob' | 'arrayBuffer'` — default response parsing (default: 'json')
- `retry?: { attempts, delay, backoff }` — retry configuration

### Methods

| Method | Signature | Returns |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| `api.fetch(url, init?)` | Same as `globalThis.fetch` | `Promise<Response>` |
| `api.get<T>(url, opts?)` | Typed GET | `Promise<FejResponse<T>>` |
| `api.post<T>(url, body?, opts?)` | Typed POST | `Promise<FejResponse<T>>` |
| `api.put<T>(url, body?, opts?)` | Typed PUT | `Promise<FejResponse<T>>` |
| `api.patch<T>(url, body?, opts?)` | Typed PATCH | `Promise<FejResponse<T>>` |
| `api.delete<T>(url, opts?)` | Typed DELETE | `Promise<FejResponse<T>>` |
| `api.fej(url, init?)` | Low-level with middleware | `Promise<Response>` |
| `api.use(name, fn, priority?)` | Add middleware | `string` |

### FejResponse<T>

```typescript
{
  data: T;           // Parsed body
  status: number;    // HTTP status
  statusText: string;
  headers: Headers;
  ok: boolean;       // true for 2xx
  raw: Response;     // Original Response
}
```

### FejBaseOptions

Shared transport options for both HTTP and SSE:
```typescript
{
  headers?: HeadersInit;
  signal?: AbortSignal;
  credentials?: RequestCredentials;
  mode?: RequestMode;
  params?: Record<string, string | number | boolean>;  // Query params
}
```

### FejRequestOptions (extends FejBaseOptions)

```typescript
{
  cache?: RequestCache;
  redirect?: RequestRedirect;
  timeout?: number;
  responseType?: 'json' | 'text' | 'blob' | 'arrayBuffer';
}
```

### SSE Streaming

| Method | Signature | Returns |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| `api.sse<T>(url, opts?)` | SSE stream | `AsyncGenerator<SSEEvent<T>>` |

#### SSEEvent<T>
{ event: string, data: T, id?: string }

#### SSEOptions (extends FejBaseOptions)
{ method?, body?, reconnect?, maxRetries?, retryDelay?, terminators?, onOpen? }

#### Usage
```typescript
// OpenAI streaming
for await (const event of api.sse<ChatChunk>('/chat/completions', {
  method: 'POST',
  body: { model: 'gpt-4', stream: true, messages },
})) {
  process.stdout.write(event.data.choices[0].delta.content);
}
```

### Errors

- `FejError` — base error class
- `FejHttpError` — HTTP 4xx/5xx errors (has `.status`, `.statusText`, `.data`, `.headers`)
- `FejSSEError` — SSE-specific errors (has `.response`)
- `FejTimeoutError` — timeout errors
- `FejRetryError` — retry exhaustion errors

### Error Handling

```typescript
import { FejHttpError } from 'fej';

try {
  await api.get('/users/999');
} catch (error) {
  if (error instanceof FejHttpError) {
    console.log(error.status);  // 404
    console.log(error.data);    // parsed response body
  }
}
```

### Common Patterns

#### File Upload
```typescript
const form = new FormData();
form.append('file', file);
await api.post('/upload', form);  // FormData sent as-is, no JSON stringify
```

#### Middleware: Logging
```typescript
api.use('logger', async (ctx, next) => {
  const start = Date.now();
  await next();
  console.log(`${ctx.request.url} — ${Date.now() - start}ms`);
});
```

#### Disable error throwing
```typescript
const api = createFej({ throwHttpErrors: false });
const { data, status } = await api.get('/maybe-404');
if (status === 404) { /* handle */ }
```
